title: Remove specific kernel version number requirement from install.md
body:
Existing specific version number requirement is misleading.  So far consensus in #3295 appears to eschew specific version numbers.  This PR should be rejected if #3295 is accepted, and vice versa.

/kind documentation

comments.body: ./tests/validate/whitespace.sh complains about a dangling whitespace.  Other than that, LGTM. Thank you!
Failing because I missed the DCO on the first commit -- was hoping a later signoff by the same committer would override that.  Want me to close and resubmit on a new branch?

Just squash your commits, then this should pass.

LGTM
You PR needs to be rebased and remove the merged patch.
